questions.question_text_full:
Select the set in which the numbers are related in the same way as are the numbers of the given sets:
(213, 157), (185, 129)
questions.notes: The options are labeled a, b, c, d in the image, mapped to 1, 2, 3, 4 respectively.

questions.question_text_full:
Three of the following four options are alike in a certain way and thus form a group. Which is the one that does NOT belong to that group?
(NOTE: Operations should be performed on the whole numbers, without breaking down the numbers into its constituent digits.)
questions.notes: The options are labeled a, b, c, d in the image, mapped to 1, 2, 3, 4 respectively.

warnings: Question 14 is incomplete on the page (only the stem is visible, no options).
